steps.title: Identify what “both” requires
steps.content: Alegado concluded that BOTH bacteria types might have played a role in multicellular development. Bowman studied one bacterium and Ahmed studied the other. To support a “both” conclusion, the evidence must show findings from BOTH researchers.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Choice A shows that both Bowman and Ahmed found S. rosetta forms colonies after bacterial exposure. Choices B, C, and D each limit findings to one researcher or show no findings at all, failing to support a conclusion about both bacteria. This supports Alegado's conclusion because it shows both bacteria trigger the same colony response. That matches choice A — A is correct.
